labels.zh: 适配映射基础设施模块
labels.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュール

definitions.en: models shared adapter mapping records, mapping direction, conversion warnings, unsupported semantics, loss notes, approximation evidence, and source-backed conversion governance across all adapter families
definitions.zh: 适配映射基础设施模块刻画跨适配器族共享的映射规则、映射方向、转换警告、转换损失、不支持语义、近似证据和来源约束治理。
definitions.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュールは、アダプタ族を横断する写像規則、写像方向、変換警告、変換損失、未対応意味、近似証拠、出典制約ガバナンスを扱います。

purpose.zh: 本模块在“适配映射基础设施模块”边界内，以 MappingRule governs Adapter 为代表闭包，把概念层级、语义关系和节点内信息组织成可查询、可验证的一张统一图。
purpose.en: Within the Adapter Mapping Infrastructure Module boundary, this Module uses MappingRule governs Adapter as a representative closure fact and organizes taxonomy, semantic relations, and node information as one queryable, verifiable graph.
purpose.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュールの境界内で、MappingRule governs Adapter を代表閉包事実とし、分類・意味関係・ノード内情報を検索・検証可能な単一グラフとして組織します。

includes.zh: 本模块直接拥有 6 个概念和 10 条 source-owned 关系；定义、字段、约束、实例、引用和解释附着在对应 canonical 节点或关系上。
includes.en: 6 directly owned Concepts and 10 source-owned relations; definitions, fields, constraints, instances, citations, and explanations are attached to the corresponding canonical node or relation.
includes.ja: 本モジュールが直接所有する 6 個の概念と 10 本の source-owned 関係。定義・項目・制約・インスタンス・引用・説明は対応する canonical ノードまたは関係に付属します。

excludes.zh: 兄弟模块拥有的概念，以及与主图并行的 schema 图、实例图或案例影子图；跨模块语义只通过 canonical ID 和唯一关系事实引用。
excludes.en: Concepts owned by sibling Modules and any schema, instance, or case shadow graph parallel to the primary graph; cross-Module meaning is referenced only through canonical IDs and one relation fact.
excludes.ja: 兄弟モジュール所有の概念、および主グラフと並行する schema・instance・事例のシャドーグラフ。モジュール横断意味は canonical ID と一つの関係事実だけで参照します。

not_applicable_reason.zh: 适配映射基础设施模块当前没有已接受的 canonical recovery 关系；本发布将该项明确标为不适用，而不以字段或示例伪造一条边。
not_applicable_reason.en: Adapter Mapping Infrastructure Module has no accepted canonical recovery relation in this release; the facet is explicitly not applicable instead of being fabricated from fields or examples.
not_applicable_reason.ja: アダプタ写像基盤モジュールには本リリースで承認済み canonical recovery 関係がなく、項目や例から辺を捏造せず明示的に非適用とします。

decision_note.zh: 本模块唯一拥有 Adapter 根。MappingArtifact 统一规则、警告、测试结果和覆盖报告等有身份的信息产物；这些产物描述、验证或汇总适配器映射，但不是 Adapter 的组成层级。
decision_note.en: This module exclusively owns the Adapter root. MappingArtifact groups identity-bearing mapping rules, warnings, test results, and coverage reports. Those artifacts describe, validate, or summarize adapter mappings but are not components in the Adapter specialization hierarchy.
decision_note.ja: 本モジュールだけが Adapter 根を所有します。MappingArtifact は識別可能な写像規則、警告、試験結果、網羅率報告を統合します。これらはアダプター写像を記述・検証・要約しますが、Adapter 特殊化階層の構成要素ではありません。

descriptions.zh: MWA-217 的 MappingRule 约束 Adapter 如何转换补丁与回归数据；若 src/lib/ontology-index.ts 的字段无法无损映射，ConversionWarning 明确指向相应 SchemaAdapter。 本地解释复用已接受关系 MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter。
descriptions.en: For MWA-217, MappingRule governs how Adapter converts patch and regression data; ConversionWarning points to the responsible SchemaAdapter if a src/lib/ontology-index.ts field cannot be mapped losslessly. This local explanation reuses accepted relations MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter.
descriptions.ja: MWA-217 では、MappingRule が Adapter によるパッチと回帰データの変換を統制し、src/lib/ontology-index.ts のフィールドを無損失で写像できない場合は ConversionWarning が該当 SchemaAdapter を指します。 この局所説明は承認済み関係 MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter を再利用します。

expected_result.zh: 映射成功时保留缺陷、补丁结果和评估标识；有损转换则产生可追踪告警。
expected_result.en: A successful mapping preserves defect, patch-result, and evaluation IDs; a lossy conversion emits a traceable warning.
expected_result.ja: 写像成功時は欠陥、パッチ結果、評価 ID を保持し、損失のある変換では追跡可能な警告を生成します。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 这是 MWA-217 同一案例的模块内解释；MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 连接既有 canonical 节点，缺陷事实只作为节点内信息。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: This is an in-module explanation of the same MWA-217 case: MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter connects existing canonical nodes and defect facts remain inline information.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 同じ MWA-217 事例のモジュール内説明です。MappingRule-governs-Adapter, MappingRule-governs-Adapter, ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter は既存 canonical ノードを接続し、欠陥事実はノード内情報として保持します。

short_definitions.zh: 转换警告是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。
short_definitions.en: conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.
short_definitions.ja: 変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。

definitions.en: conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.
definitions.zh: 转换警告是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。
definitions.ja: 変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。

why_needed.zh: 转换警告为canonical 事实 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）提供明确端点并保持与 CoverageReport 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: conversion warning provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter (ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter) while preserving its reviewed boundary from CoverageReport.
why_needed.ja: 変換警告はcanonical 事実 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）の明確な端点を提供し、CoverageReport との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的转换警告：转换警告是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。；该种差可由关系 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes conversion warning records satisfying this reviewed differentia: conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす変換警告を含みます：変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。 種差は関係 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.zh: 映射覆盖报告虽与本概念同属 MappingArtifact，但其定义为“映射覆盖报告是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。”，不得替代转换警告。
excludes.en: CoverageReport shares parent MappingArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “A CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results.”; it must not be substituted for ConversionWarning.
excludes.ja: CoverageReport は同じ上位 MappingArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。」であり、ConversionWarning の代用にはできません。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，ConversionWarning 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）；该记录不与边界对照项 CoverageReport 混用。转换警告是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, ConversionWarning participates in canonical fact ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter (ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast CoverageReport. conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、ConversionWarning は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter（ConversionWarning warns_about SchemaAdapter）へ参加します。境界対照 CoverageReport と混同しません。変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter 的 ConversionWarning 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve ConversionWarning as an endpoint of ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter の端点として ConversionWarning を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 ConversionWarning-warns_about-SchemaAdapter を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.locator: Documentation page > Pydantic JSON Schema heading and documented conceptual model

descriptions.zh: CoverageReport 用作ConversionWarning的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 CoverageReport 的已审查定义是“映射覆盖报告是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。”。不能因 shared parent MappingArtifact 而把它归入ConversionWarning。
descriptions.en: CoverageReport is the boundary contrast for ConversionWarning. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but CoverageReport's reviewed definition is “A CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results.”. shared parent MappingArtifact does not make it a ConversionWarning.
descriptions.ja: CoverageReport は ConversionWarning の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、CoverageReport の審査済み定義は「CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。」です。shared parent MappingArtifact だけで ConversionWarning にはなりません。

short_definitions.zh: 在保持统一核心身份的前提下，对外部系统表示与 canonical 概念进行有方向转换的互操作能力。
short_definitions.en: An interoperability capability that directionally converts between an external system representation and canonical concepts while preserving canonical identity.
short_definitions.ja: 標準識別を保ちながら外部システム表現と canonical 概念を方向付き変換する相互運用能力です。

definitions.zh: 适配器是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。
definitions.en: An Adapter is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity.
definitions.ja: Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。

why_needed.zh: 适配器为canonical 事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）提供明确端点并保持与 MappingRule 的定义边界；节点字段 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope 使该区别可验证。
why_needed.en: adapter provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact MappingRule-governs-Adapter (MappingRule governs Adapter) while preserving its reviewed boundary from MappingRule; node fields adapter_id, adapter_version, scope make that distinction testable.
why_needed.ja: アダプターはcanonical 事実 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）の明確な端点を提供し、MappingRule との審査済み境界を保ちながら。ノード項目 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope によりその区別を検証できます。

includes.en: Includes adapter records satisfying this reviewed differentia: An Adapter is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity. The differentia can be checked through fields adapter_id, adapter_version, scope.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たすアダプターを含みます：Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。 種差は項目 adapter_id、adapter_version、scope で検査できます。

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，Adapter 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）；该记录不与边界对照项 MappingRule 混用。适配器是具有身份、版本、适用外部系统、转换方向、支持范围和一致性声明的互操作能力，依据 MappingRule 在外部构造与统一概念、关系或内嵌结构之间转换，并显式报告 exact、lossy、unsupported 与 round-trip 结果；它不复制外部类树，也不改变 canonical 节点身份。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, Adapter participates in canonical fact MappingRule-governs-Adapter (MappingRule governs Adapter) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast MappingRule. An Adapter is an identity-bearing interoperability capability with version, applicable external system, direction, supported scope, and conformance statement. It applies MappingRule records to convert between external constructs and canonical concepts, relations, or embedded structure, explicitly reporting exact, lossy, unsupported, and round-trip outcomes. It does not copy the external class tree or alter canonical node identity.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、Adapter は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 MappingRule-governs-Adapter（MappingRule governs Adapter）へ参加します。境界対照 MappingRule と混同しません。Adapter は識別・版・対象外部システム・方向・対応範囲・適合声明を持つ相互運用能力で、MappingRule により外部構成と標準概念・関係・内蔵構造を変換し、exact・lossy・unsupported・round-trip 結果を明示します。外部クラス木を複製せず canonical ノード識別を変えません。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的 Adapter 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve Adapter as an endpoint of MappingRule-governs-Adapter and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は MappingRule-governs-Adapter の端点として Adapter を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 MappingRule-governs-Adapter，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 MappingRule-governs-Adapter を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

source_claims.supports: Defines declarative vocabularies, assertions, annotations, and validation outcomes used as external evidence for explicit mapping rules. The cited source does not define Moonweave's internal class or relation; that boundary remains an accepted Moonweave design inference recorded in review metadata.
source_claims.locator: Core and Validation specifications > vocabularies, assertions, and annotations

descriptions.zh: MappingRule 用作Adapter的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 MappingRule 的已审查定义是“映射规则是有方向的适配产物，记录外部构造如何映射到规范术语，或规范术语如何投影到外部构造，并包含来源、版本、适用范围和损失说明。”。不能因 relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter 而把它归入Adapter。
descriptions.en: MappingRule is the boundary contrast for Adapter. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but MappingRule's reviewed definition is “directional mapping artifact that records how an external construct maps to a canonical term or how a canonical term projects to an external construct, including source, version, scope, and loss notes.”. relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter does not make it a Adapter.
descriptions.ja: MappingRule は Adapter の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、MappingRule の審査済み定義は「写像規則は方向を持つアダプタ成果物で、外部構成が標準用語へ写像される方法、または標準用語が外部構成へ投影される方法を、出典、版、範囲、損失メモとともに記録します。」です。relation MappingRule-governs-Adapter だけで Adapter にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: MappingRule 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 Adapter。
expected_result.en: MappingRule retains its own type; validation must not promote it to Adapter from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: MappingRule は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで Adapter へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 MappingRule-governs-Adapter 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of MappingRule-governs-Adapter; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、MappingRule-governs-Adapter の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

The eight-value adapter_family closure and mapping direction are reviewed Moonweave design decisions; each source establishes its external construct family, not this closed vocabulary.
decision_note.ja: Adapter は外部プロトコル、フレームワーク、ベンチマーク、エクスポート構成から canonical グラフへの写像ルートです。adapter_family の8値閉包と写像方向は Moonweave の審査済み設計であり、各出典は対応する外部構成族のみを裏付け、この閉包自体を定義しません。

short_definitions.zh: 描述、验证、警告或汇总外部构造与 canonical 构造映射的有身份信息产物。
short_definitions.en: An identity-bearing information artifact that describes, verifies, warns about, or summarizes mappings between external and canonical constructs.
short_definitions.ja: 外部構成と canonical 構成の写像を記述・検証・警告・要約する識別可能な情報成果物です。

definitions.zh: 映射信息产物是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图。
definitions.en: A MappingArtifact is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance. It includes directional mapping rules, conversion warnings, mapping-test results, and coverage reports. These artifacts may appear in Adapter node details while retaining their own identity and provenance and do not form a second graph.
definitions.ja: MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。Adapter ノード詳細へ内蔵表示しても自己の識別・来歴を保持し、第二のグラフを形成しません。

why_needed.zh: 映射信息产物为canonical 事实 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact（ConversionWarning is_a MappingArtifact）提供明确端点并保持与 ConversionWarning 的定义边界。
why_needed.en: mapping artifact provides an explicit endpoint for canonical fact ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact (ConversionWarning is_a MappingArtifact) while preserving its reviewed boundary from ConversionWarning.
why_needed.ja: 写像情報成果物はcanonical 事実 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact（ConversionWarning is_a MappingArtifact）の明確な端点を提供し、ConversionWarning との審査済み境界を保ちながら。

includes.zh: 纳入符合下列已审查种差的映射信息产物：映射信息产物是带标识、版本、作者或生成方、适用映射和证据来源的信息对象，包括方向映射规则、转换警告、映射测试结果和覆盖报告；它们可以附着在 Adapter 节点详情中，但仍保留自身身份和来源，不形成第二张图。；该种差可由关系 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact 的端点角色检验。
includes.en: Includes mapping artifact records satisfying this reviewed differentia: A MappingArtifact is an information object with identifier, version, author or producer, applicable mapping, and evidence provenance. It includes directional mapping rules, conversion warnings, mapping-test results, and coverage reports. These artifacts may appear in Adapter node details while retaining their own identity and provenance and do not form a second graph. The differentia can be checked through its endpoint role in ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact.
includes.ja: 次の審査済み種差を満たす写像情報成果物を含みます：MappingArtifact は識別子・版・作成者／生成者・適用写像・証拠来歴を持つ情報で、方向付き写像規則・変換警告・写像試験結果・網羅率報告を含みます。Adapter ノード詳細へ内蔵表示しても自己の識別・来歴を保持し、第二のグラフを形成しません。 種差は関係 ConversionWarning-is_a-MappingArtifact の端点役割で検査できます。

excludes.en: ConversionWarning shares parent MappingArtifact, but its reviewed definition is “conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”; it must not be substituted for CoverageReport.
excludes.ja: ConversionWarning は同じ上位 MappingArtifact を持ちますが、審査済み定義は「変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」であり、CoverageReport の代用にはできません。

labels.en: Positive example of mapping coverage report
labels.ja: 写像網羅率報告の正例

descriptions.zh: 在可核验图谱片段中，CoverageReport 以自身 canonical ID 参与canonical 事实 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule（CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule）；该记录不与边界对照项 ConversionWarning 混用。映射覆盖报告是一种 MappingArtifact，针对明确的 Adapter、外部版本和 canonical 版本，汇总构造总数、已映射数、exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数、测试结果引用、已知空白和发布门禁；它是聚合报告，不替代单条规则或测试结果。
descriptions.en: In a verifiable graph fragment, CoverageReport participates in canonical fact CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule (CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule) under its own canonical ID; the record is not conflated with boundary contrast ConversionWarning. A CoverageReport is a MappingArtifact for a specified Adapter, external version, and canonical version. It aggregates construct totals, mapped totals, exact/lossy/unsupported/untested counts, test-result references, known gaps, and release gates. It is an aggregate report and does not replace individual rules or test results.
descriptions.ja: 検証可能なグラフ断片で、CoverageReport は自身の canonical ID によりcanonical 事実 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule（CoverageReport summarizes MappingRule）へ参加します。境界対照 ConversionWarning と混同しません。CoverageReport は特定 Adapter・外部版・canonical 版について構成総数・写像数・exact/lossy/unsupported/untested 数・試験結果参照・既知空白・公開ゲートを集計する MappingArtifact で、個別規則・試験結果を代替しません。

expected_result.zh: 查询必须解析到 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule 的 CoverageReport 端点，并通过该节点的字段与种差校验。
expected_result.en: The query must resolve CoverageReport as an endpoint of CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule and validate the node's fields and differentia.
expected_result.ja: 照会は CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule の端点として CoverageReport を解決し、ノードの項目と種差を検証しなければなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 示例复用真实端点和关系 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule，没有用名称相似性替代关系或类型断言。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The example reuses the actual endpoints and relation CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule; name similarity does not substitute for a relation or type assertion.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: この例は実在する端点と関係 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule を再利用し、名称類似性で関係または型アサーションを代替しません。

descriptions.zh: ConversionWarning 用作CoverageReport的边界对照：两者可见于同一图谱片段，但 ConversionWarning 的已审查定义是“转换警告是适配转换治理事件，记录映射过程中的转换损失、近似、不支持语义、歧义、非往返行为或需要人工审查的条件。”。不能因 shared parent MappingArtifact 而把它归入CoverageReport。
descriptions.en: ConversionWarning is the boundary contrast for CoverageReport. Both may occur in one graph fragment, but ConversionWarning's reviewed definition is “conversion governance event that records mapping loss, approximation, unsupported semantics, ambiguity, non-round-trip behavior, or review requirements during adapter conversion.”. shared parent MappingArtifact does not make it a CoverageReport.
descriptions.ja: ConversionWarning は CoverageReport の境界対照です。同じグラフ断片に現れ得ますが、ConversionWarning の審査済み定義は「変換警告はアダプタ変換のガバナンスイベントで、写像中の変換損失、近似、未対応意味、曖昧さ、非往復性、レビュー要件を記録します。」です。shared parent MappingArtifact だけで CoverageReport にはなりません。

expected_result.zh: ConversionWarning 保持其原有类型，验证器不得凭关系共现把它提升为 CoverageReport。
expected_result.en: ConversionWarning retains its own type; validation must not promote it to CoverageReport from relation co-occurrence.
expected_result.ja: ConversionWarning は元の型を維持し、関係の共起だけで CoverageReport へ昇格してはなりません。

why_valid_or_invalid.zh: 边界例点名实际对照节点，并保留 CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule 的方向；只有显式 is_a 或完整种差才支持成员资格。
why_valid_or_invalid.en: The boundary names an actual contrast node and preserves the direction of CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule; only an explicit is_a fact or the complete differentia supports membership.
why_valid_or_invalid.ja: 境界例は実在する対照ノードを示し、CoverageReport-summarizes-MappingRule の方向を保持します。明示的 is_a または完全な種差だけが所属を支持します。

descriptions.en: In synthetic run emits_conversion_warning-scenario-001, MappingRule explicitly emits conversion warning ConversionWarning; the assertion preserves its source-to-target direction, predicate, and qualifiers. Reviewed definition: links a mapping rule to the conversion warning emitted when an adapter mapping loses information, approximates semantics, encounters unsupported features, or requires review.

expected_result.zh: 该对象按定义被识别为emits conversion warning。

expected_result.ja: この対象はレビュー済み定義によりemits conversion warningとして分類されます。
